particulars.description: Part of sentinel house southampton row camden (lot 14) sentinel house, 58-60 southampton row, holborn london t/n LN142392 by way of fixed charge, the benefit of all covenants & rights concerning the property & all plant machinery, fixtures, fittings, furniture, equipment, implements & utensils. The goodwill of any business carried on at the property & the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.
